channel.title: ZFW – Advances in Economic Geography
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in ZFW – Advances in Economic Geography

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-frontmatter3-4

item.title: Driving Change in Troubling Times: Security, Risk and the State in Global Production Networks
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-0085

item.title: Friendshoring in global production networks: state-orchestrated coupling amid geopolitical uncertainty
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-0042

item.title: Geopolitics and geospatial strategies: the rise of regulatory supply chain controls for semiconductor GPN in Japan, South Korea and Taiwan
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-0046

item.title: Military conflicts and the performance of state-owned enterprises: a study of Ukraine’s aerospace, defense, and electro-engineering industries before and after the 2014 Crimea and Donbas occupation
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-0049

item.title: A “return of the state” in energy transitions? The making of a hydrogen economy in the European Union
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-0050

item.title: State power, Global Production Networks, and underdevelopment: examining South Carolina’s success in fostering strategic coupling
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-0044

item.title: The resource-making state: liquefied natural gas production networks and state strategies for domestic market development in Indonesia
item.description: Article by Alexander Steven Dodge, Ståle A. Rye DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zfw-2024-0047
